# Review Checklist

Pre-sign-off checks for the BRD/PRD and its review pack. Tick each; unresolved
items belong in Open Questions / Sign-off blockers.

## Document quality
- [ ] Quality stamp present (Clarify score + band) or marked "not run".
- [ ] Executive summary present (BRD); Scope before Stakeholders.
- [ ] No `blocker`-level finding outstanding (else status stays Draft).
- [ ] Business requirements are outcome-oriented and prioritized (M/S/C).
- [ ] Business language in the BRD body; deep mechanics in Downstream Technical Notes.

## Process & screens
- [ ] §7 process-centric: Flow Catalog, then per-flow blocks (same process per block).
- [ ] Each decision-rich flow has an activity diagram; multi-system flow a sequence.
- [ ] Screen flow derives from the screen inventory; no invented screens.
- [ ] Each wireframe maps to Flow/Step; CTAs map to actions; errors map to codes;
      states map to §9.2 — unknowns are OPEN QUESTION; stamped low-fi (not final UI).

## Errors, state, traceability
- [ ] Error map has Flow/Step + user-facing message (no jargon) + transaction status.
- [ ] Entity state and transaction/operation state both modeled where relevant.
- [ ] Traceability: Requirement → Flow → Screen → Rule → Error/State → Story → Test;
      orphans flagged.

## Pack integrity
- [ ] Every diagram renders in the HTML pack OR shows code + viewer link + a badge.
- [ ] Manifest lists every artifact with render status; artifact index present.
- [ ] Pack opens with no copy-paste to web viewers; fallback verified.
- [ ] Nothing invented beyond the source files; final doc unchanged.
